deletion_protection.description: Determines if the folder is protected from being deleted; set to true to enable protection.

display_name.description: Specifies the display name of the folder, must be unique within the parent and can contain up to 30 characters.

parent.description: Specifies the parent resource in which the folder will be created. Must be either a folder or organization in the format "folders/{folder_id}" or "organizations/{organization_id}".

tags.description: List of key-value pairs to organize and label the folder; must be a map.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeouts for creating, updating, and deleting the Google Folder, specified in a duration format (e.g., "10m").
